title: Player brake damage (VS)
description: adds G-overload damage for players (accidents), made primarily for Valkyrien skies.
body:
Adds player damage from G-overload and collisions for all types of vehicles, (Except for elites). Now you can't jump on a water pixel and survive. For example, when you're speeding on a boat or VS structure and crash, you'll take damage based on your speed and how quickly you stop. It was primarily developed for the [Valkyrien skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) mod, so it's compatible with it.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0Rn1V3o-l4Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

the mod config is located in the src\main\java\com\lucse\brakedamage\SuddenStopHandler.java source code folder.

To change it, you will need to download the source code, modify it, and compile it. I am not aware of how to create a proper config.

**VS 2.4+ not tested**
